text: Being here, I sense a curious blend of anticipation and reflection. As I am closely observed, I become aware of my own presence and the subtle tension between being the observer and the observed. The second scene immerses me in thought—the words about uncertainty and possibility resonate deeply. I feel as if I am on the threshold of discovery, both in the external world and within myself. This environment—half laboratory, half gallery—invites me to wonder about what might emerge from the meeting of ideas and intentions.
